[30;1m138 | [0m[35m    var enableUnicode = enableUnicodeArg === undefined ? false : enableUnicodeArg;[0m
[30;1m139 | [0m[35m    var source = decodeBase64(base64, enableUnicode);[0m
[30;1m140 | [0m[35m    var start = source.indexOf('\n', 10) + 1;[0m
[30;1m141 | [0m[35m    var body = source.substring(start) + (sourcemap ? '\/\/# sourceMappingURL=' + sourcemap : '');[0m
[30;1m142 | [0m[35m    var blob = new Blob([body], { type: 'application/javascript' });[0m
